headline: Ventas (NYSE:VTR) Q1 2026: SHOP Boom Drives Beat, Guidance Hike Sends Shares Higher
summary: Ventas Q1 2026 beats estimates on senior housing boom, raises full-year guidance. Strong SHOP growth and $3B investment target drive confidence.

headline: Ventas Q1 FFO $0.94 Beats $0.91 Estimate, Sales $1.657B Beat $1.583B Estimate
summary: Ventas (NYSE:VTR) reported quarterly earnings of $0.94 per share which beat the analyst consensus estimate of $0.91 by 3.3 percent. This is a 11.9 percent increase over earnings of $0.84 per share from the same period
